metadata.vintage: Cycle pattern from CHFA's published Qualified Allocation Plan (QAP) + Annual Allocation Plan, supplemented by CHFA press releases. Exact 2026 R2 + 2027 dates may shift — verify on chfainfo.com.
notes: Two competitive 9% LIHTC rounds per year (R1 + R2)
4% LIHTC + PAB is rolling — no fixed deadline, but tied to CHFA's annual PAB allocation
State LIHTC follows federal 9% + 4% cycles (must be paired)
MIHTC (Middle Income Housing Tax Credit) is annual, typically R1-aligned
Prop 123 awards run through DOLA on a separate cycle — see cdola.colorado.gov/proposition-123
Annual Allocation Plan published in December for following calendar year
QAP draft + public comment period typically September-October each year

events.name: 2026 R1 9% LIHTC — application deadline
events.details: R1 applications were due. 14 developments totaling 634 units / $219M allocated.

events.name: 2026 R1 9% LIHTC — awards announced
events.details: R1 reservation announcements; 2026 R1 awards bridge file in data/affordable-housing/chfa-awards/2026-round-one.json until live ArcGIS catches up.

events.name: 2026 R2 9% LIHTC — application deadline
events.details: Estimated based on CHFA's historical August R2 deadline. Verify exact date at chfainfo.com — typically published 60-90 days before.

events.name: 2026 R2 9% LIHTC — awards announced
events.details: R2 reservations typically announced mid-December. Bridge file pattern in data/affordable-housing/chfa-awards/ will be used until live ArcGIS catches up.

events.name: 2027 QAP draft — public comment period
events.details: Draft 2027 Qualified Allocation Plan typically released for public comment in September-October. Critical window for developers + advocates to flag scoring concerns.

events.name: 2027 Annual Allocation Plan published
events.details: CHFA's 2027 Annual Allocation Plan typically published in December. Sets cycle dates, credit ceiling, set-asides for the upcoming year.

events.name: 2027 R1 9% LIHTC — application deadline
events.details: Estimated based on CHFA's historical early-February R1 deadline.

events.name: 2027 R1 9% LIHTC — awards announced
events.details: R1 reservation announcements typically late May.

rolling_programs.name: 4% LIHTC + PAB (Private Activity Bond)
rolling_programs.description: 4% Tax-Exempt Bond financing is reviewed on a rolling basis (no fixed deadline). Limited by annual PAB allocation — see data/pab-allocations.json for current year's available cap.

rolling_programs.name: MIHTC (Middle Income Housing Tax Credit)
rolling_programs.description: State-only Middle Income tax credit serving 80-120% AMI. Annual cycle typically R1-aligned. Small allocation; competitive.

rolling_programs.name: Colorado State LIHTC
rolling_programs.description: State tax credit MUST be paired with federal 9% or 4%. Same cycles as federal. Roughly doubles equity yield on stacked deals.

rolling_programs.name: Proposition 123 — Affordable Housing Fund
rolling_programs.description: Colorado statutory affordable-housing fund administered by DOLA. Separate cycle from CHFA — see cdola.colorado.gov/proposition-123 for current rounds.
